questions.prompt: Remember... your passport with you to confirm your identity.
Look at those monkeys! I... a picture before they run away!
Since the lift was out of order I... use the stairs.
Please, take your umbrella... it rains.
The Cabinet has already been reorganised by the Prime Minister.
answers: The Prime Minister has already reorganised the Cabinet

questions.prompt: Scientists have to conduct a new study to evaluate the situation after the volcano’s eruption.
answers: A new study to evaluate the situation after the volcano’s eruption has to be conducted
A new study has to be conducted to evaluate the situation after the volcano’s eruption

questions.prompt: She’s been in charge for a couple of years.
questions.instruction: Give a question for the underlined words.
answers: (For) How long has she been in charge?
How long has she been in charge?

questions.prompt: The knife had a really sharp blade. I got cut with it.
answers: The knife with which I got cut had a really sharp blade
I got cut with the knife(,) which had a really sharp blade
I got cut with the knife which had a really sharp blade

questions.prompt: This coat is too heavy to be worn all day long.
answers: This coat isn’t light enough to be worn all day long

questions.prompt: Despite my complaint, I did not get a pay rise.
answers: Although I complained / had complained, I did not get a pay rise

questions.prompt: In addition with making his bed, my little brother always helps me with many others household chores.
questions.instruction: Find the mistakes and rewrite correctly.
answers: In addition to making his bed, my little brother always helps me with many other household chores

questions.prompt: The coach asked us why we had lost focus during the previous day’s match.
answers: Why did you lose focus during yesterday’s match?” the coach asked (us) / told us
Why did you lose focus during yesterday’s match?” the coach asked / told us
The coach said (to us) / told us / asked (us), “Why did you lose focus during yesterday’s match?
The coach said / told us / asked , “Why did you lose focus during yesterday’s match?

questions.prompt: Use the words in the boxes to make a meaningful sentence. Use all and only the words in the boxes without changing their form.
questions.instruction: Words: will / my / by / done / I / get / professional / a / nails
answers: I will get my nails done by a professional
